expectations.text: Output is valid JSON parseable by json.loads
Top-level JSON contains case, parties, events, relationships, disputes, sources, lanes
Captures the Sept 8 / Oct 3, 2022 disputed date as a Dispute with two version Events
expectations.evidence: disputed Events found: Sept 8=False, Oct 3=False, disputes count=0

expectations.text: Has at least 2 Events with date_certainty='disputed' linked by the same dispute_id
Dispute record's materiality field mentions temporal proximity, cure period, or causation
Has at least 10 Events total covering factual + procedural
Includes Complaint (Apr 11, 2023), Answer (May 22, 2023), MSJ (Aug 8, 2024), and oral argument (Nov 14, 2024)
Includes hire date (Mar 4, 2019), Sept 8, 2022 email, Oct 14, 2022 PIP, and Dec 19, 2022 termination
Sources preserve citation format verbatim (e.g., 'Wells Dep. 42:18-43:7', 'Ex. P-4', 'Dkt. 1', not normalized)
At least 80% of Events have non-empty source_ids
